name: Tape Measure
description: You’ve located the Tape Measure, the most borrowed and least returned tool in the pit. Its 'High-Visibility' yellow casing is currently doing its best to blend into the shadows near the Ethernet switch. This is an Easy target for anyone who knows that 'eyeballing' a 28-inch frame perimeter is a one-way ticket to a Red Card during inspection. Just don't let it snap back too fast, or you'll lose a finger—and your dignity in front of the mentors.
